title: Quality filter: drop re-ask/correction pairs
acceptance_criteria: Drops pairs where output starts with 'Could you clarify', 'I need more', re-ask patterns
Drops pairs where user corrected output within 3 turns of same session
completion_summary: internal/quality: Filter() drops pairs with re-ask output prefixes (30 patterns) and detects correction turns within 3-turn session window (20 patterns). Groups records by SessionID, sorts by CreatedAt, checks input for correction language against prior outputs. 8 tests pass: empty, good kept, re-ask dropped, correction dropped, session isolation.
